title: RHO Manifest
description: Frozen configuration block for a K-rho viability certificate. Must be committed before run starts and never mutated afterward.

run_id.description: Globally unique run identifier. Format: RUN-YYYY-MM-DD-XXX

thresholds.description: Frozen margin thresholds. Once committed, these cannot change for this run.

Delta_floor.description: Minimum admissible gap (mu_Delta threshold). Maps to mu_Delta margin.

eps_Pi.description: Maximum allowed projector drift (mu_Pi threshold). Maps to mu_Pi margin.

M_floor.description: Minimum Lyapunov exponent margin (mu_Lyap threshold). Maps to mu_Lyap margin.

R2_floor.description: Minimum R^2 goodness-of-fit (mu_CFL threshold). Maps to mu_CFL margin.

mu_floor.description: Minimum autocorrelation margin (mu_Z threshold). Maps to mu_Z margin.

tau.description: Lookback window (steps) for rolling margin computation.

audit.description: Audit tolerance block. delta_audit is the numerical tolerance for linter checks.

delta_audit.description: Absolute tolerance for numeric comparisons in helen_rho_lint.py. Use 1e-12 for float64, 1e-6 for float32.

environment.description: Frozen environment block. Captures all degrees of freedom that affect reproducibility.

precision.description: Floating-point precision used throughout the run.

backend.description: Computation backend identifier (e.g., numpy, jax-cpu, jax-gpu, torch-cpu).

global.description: Master random seed for the run.

streams.description: Optional per-stream seeds keyed by stream name.

commit.description: Git commit SHA (min 7 chars) of the codebase used for this run.

latex_spine.description: Path or identifier of the LaTeX spine document this run certifies against.
